title: Lodestone Locator
description: Placing a down lodestone will make a waypoint in the player locator bar
body:
# Lodestone Locator
![The player locator bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a951691e5cc75847af92182504b3a365fd79be1e.png)

Minecraft have recently released version 1.21.6, this update has the player locator bar. But it ONLY locates players, it has so much potential to be a VANILLA waypoint system.

# Functionality
Whenever you place down a lodestone, another waypoint will become visible in the bar.
You may change the color of this by putting carpets ontop of it, or just make it invisible by putting a carved pumpkin ontop.

![3 Lodestones with carpets on them showcasing their carpet color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43194539f3f8768e7ffcfb9c7519785921ccf8bc_0.webp)

Players may make the player icon a "distance" type thing by placing a moss/pale moss carpet on the lodestone. These will make the waypoint have a 1000 block and 500 block distance respectfully.
